artifact.transcript:
AI: Hightower Plumbing, this is Sarah, how can I help you?
Caller: Yeah my basement is flooding right now, like there's water coming in fast I don't know what to do.
AI: Okay, this is an emergency. First — do you know where your main water shutoff valve is?
Caller: Uh, I think it's near the water heater?
AI: Go shut that off right now if you can, it'll stop more water coming in. I'm getting someone out to you as soon as possible. What's your name and address?
Caller: Dave Kowalski, 902 Palmetto Boulevard, Tampa.
AI: Got it Dave. I'm flagging this as an emergency right now. Someone will call you back within 15 minutes. Is your phone number the one you're calling from?
Caller: Yeah that's my cell.
AI: Perfect. Go shut off that valve and stay on the safe side of the water. You'll hear back very shortly.
Caller: Okay thank you.

structuredData.issue_summary: Basement actively flooding, caller reporting fast water intrusion.
